description: Create a new package in this monorepo that exposes Exa-backed web search tools/config for pi, following existing package conventions and using env var + config file setup similar to the other packages. Model behavior after the existing Exa/web-search concept already implemented in ../alfred-ts for the assistant runtime.

comments.text:
Implemented `@solvedbydev/pi-exa-extension` as a new Exa-backed `web_search` pi extension package with `.pi/exa-config.json` + env-var config loading, compatibility aliases for the Alfred/runtime-style key names, README docs, and unit coverage for config loading, tool behavior, and tool registration.

Validation run:
- `npm run lint`
- `npm run test`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm run build -w @solvedbydev/pi-exa-extension`

Commit: `3f63a3b` (`feat(pi-exa): add Exa-backed web search extension`)

title: Add pi extension package for Exa web search support
